props.ChoiceText: Stone, dust, and weight taught you how work can grind a person down without ever quite killing them.
props.ChoiceBio: Quarry and mine duty hardened your body while grinding down everything gentler.

0.TransitionText: Because quarry and mine duty hardened your body while grinding down everything gentler, your life remained one of burden, wages, and endurance.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Laborer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because quarry and mine duty hardened your body while grinding down everything gentler, rough work taught your hands enough to seek something more skilled.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.
